title: lecanium
intro: Lecanium, also known as the scale insect, is not a plant but a small insect that feeds on plant sap. However, I can provide information on Lecanium psyllinum, a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. Lecanium psyllinum has medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as skin conditions and fever. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and salves, which are used to harness its health benefits.
